items.title: Hugging Face and Cerebras bring Gemma 4 to real-time voice AI
items.core_innovation: Cerebras hardware serving Gemma 4 for low-latency voice apps
items.significance: Shows real-time voice inference at scale is now deployable

items.title: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command
items.core_innovation: One-command vLLM deployment via HF Jobs infra
items.significance: Lowers barrier to spinning up production LLM inference servers

items.title: Using Local Coding Agents
items.core_innovation: Open-weight models in local harnesses as Claude/Codex alternative
items.significance: Signals growing viability of local agentic coding workflows

items.title: RaBitQCache: Rotated Binary Quantization for KVCache in Long Context LLM Inference
items.core_innovation: Binary-INT4 rotated quantization for KV cache attention estimation
items.significance: Cuts long-context memory/compute cost vs static top-k sparsity

items.title: Learning from Failure: Inference-Time Self-Improvement for Computer-Use Agents
items.core_innovation: Self-improvement loop from failed agent trajectories at inference time
items.significance: Reduces reliance on costly successful-trajectory data collection

items.title: ComplianceGate: Classifier-Gated Multi-Tier LLM Routing for Regulated Industries
items.core_innovation: PII-aware classifier routing across model tiers/jurisdictions
items.significance: Practical pattern for cost/compliance-constrained enterprise deployment

items.title: TraceLab: Characterizing Coding Agent Workloads for LLM Serving
items.core_innovation: First public trace dataset of real coding-agent serving sessions
items.significance: Fills gap for serving-system research on agentic workloads

items.title: MOPD: Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation for Capability Integration
items.core_innovation: On-policy distillation merges multiple domain-specialized RL teachers
items.significance: Addresses hard problem of combining capabilities post-training

items.title: PS-PPO: Prefix-Sampling PPO for Critic-Free RLHF
items.core_innovation: Prefix-level signal propagation avoids full-trajectory PPO updates
items.significance: Cuts RLHF optimization cost for long reasoning traces

items.title: The Joint Effect of Quantization and Sampling Temperature on LLM Safety Alignment
items.core_innovation: Factorial study of quantization x temperature on safety alignment
items.significance: Reveals deployment knobs can silently degrade safety guarantees

items.title: When Does Online Imitation Learning Help in LLM Post-Training?
items.core_innovation: Realizability, not error accumulation, explains online IL benefits
items.significance: Reframes theoretical basis for on-policy distillation gains

items.title: Bridging the Gap Between Latent and Explicit Reasoning with Looped Transformers
items.core_innovation: Recurrent-depth looped transformers close latent-vs-explicit CoT gap
items.significance: Could enable efficient latent reasoning at larger model scales

items.title: When Does Learning to Stop Help? A Cost-Aware Study of Early Exits in Reasoning Models
items.core_innovation: LearnStop: learned checkpoint stopper vs confidence thresholds
items.significance: Practical route to adaptive test-time compute budgeting

items.title: Before Thinking, Learn to Decide: Proactive Routing for Efficient Visual Reasoning
items.core_innovation: Difficulty-aware routing between draft and target multimodal models
items.significance: Speeds up visual CoT inference without accuracy loss
